description: VitalGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Techno Gear bag from VitalGear. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Height: 44 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 20 cm Made of polyester One main zippered compartment One zippered compartment on the front Two zippered compartments on the front compartment with the smaller compartment containing organiser pouches Two adjustable padded shoulder straps with buckles and a mesh padded back for support Trolley system and two wheels Padded haul loop for handling ease Zippered compartment to conceal the shoulder straps in case of using the bag through the trolley system Wash care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
